name: Lenox Park
address: 1400 East West Highway, Silver Spring, MD 20910
approxRentRange: $2,293-$2,638/month (2BR, 12-month lease, as of mid-2026; 1.5 months free special on select units)
bathroomsNote: 2BR units come with 1 or 2 baths depending on floor plan (e.g., Blair and Elsworth plans); 1088 sq ft 2BR/2BA confirmed listed
notes: 407-unit high-rise, 16 stories, built 1991-1992; managed by Bernstein Management Corporation.

RentCafe lists '24/7 concierge'; ApartmentList confirms '24-hour front desk.' Leasing office hours are Tue-Fri 9AM-6PM, Sat 10AM-6PM; front desk/concierge staffing is likely separate from leasing. Hours for the front desk are not independently confirmed as 24/7, so doormanStatus is 'Likely staffed' rather than 'Confirmed 24h'.
Resident reviews on Yelp and ApartmentRatings describe the concierge as present but inconsistent in helpfulness; security sign-in policy enforced.
In-unit washer/dryer listed as standard; some listings note 'select homes' (may not be universal across all units). Verify at tour.
Balconies/patios listed as available on select units; not all units have one.
Pet policy: up to 2 pets; $300 deposit, $25/month per pet; breed restrictions (German Shepherd, Pit Bull, Rottweiler, and others).
Individual climate control confirmed in unit listings.
One block from Silver Spring Metro (Red Line).
No 1BR+den floor plan specifically confirmed; 'has2BRor1BRDen' reflects confirmed 2BR availability.
